global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent call-to-action and branding elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book their next trip with flexible options.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'HorizonHop' in a clean, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Booking message
elements.description: A prominent text area displaying 'Book your next trip' in a bold, easy-to-read font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Flexible options
elements.description: A smaller text area below the main message that reads 'Flexible booking options', providing additional context.

elements.label: Booking message
elements.description: A duplicate text area displaying 'Book your next trip' in a bold, easy-to-read font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A bold, rectangular button with the text 'Order now' in a contrasting color, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Circular graphic
elements.description: A simple circular graphic element, adding visual interest without specific branding.

elements.label: Circular graphic
elements.description: Another circular graphic element, similar to the previous one, enhancing the overall design.

elements.label: Rectangular graphic
elements.description: A rectangular graphic element that complements the circular graphics, adding depth to the layout.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: A light-colored background that provides a clean and modern canvas for the text and graphics.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Flexible ons Order now

elements.label: HorizonHop headline
elements.description: The headline text 'HorizonHop' displayed prominently at the top, establishing brand identity.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
